2605.13236.title: A Hybrid Framework for Natural Language Querying of IFC Models with Relational and Graph Representations
2605.13236.paper_summary: Building Information Modeling (BIM) is widely used in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry, but the complexity of Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) limits accessibility for non-expert users. To address this, we introduce IfcLLM, a hybrid framework for natural language interaction with IFC-based BIM models. It transforms IFC models into complementary representations: a relational representation for structured element properties and geometry, and a graph representation for topological relationships. These representations are integrated through iterative retry-and-refine LLM reasoning. We implement the framework using an open-weight LLM (GPT OSS 120B), supporting reproducible and deployment-oriented workflows. Evaluation on three IFC models with queries derived from 30 scenarios shows first-attempt accuracy of 93.3%-100%, with all failures recovered using a fallback LLM. The results show that combining complementary representations with iterative reasoning enables more accessible natural language querying of IFC data while supporting routine BIM analysis tasks.
2605.13236.paper_summary_zh: 建築資訊建模（BIM）在建築、工程和施工（AEC）行業中被廣泛使用，但行業基礎類別（IFC）的複雜性限制了非專業用戶的可及性。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了IfcLLM，一個用於與基於IFC的BIM模型進行自然語言互動的混合框架。它將IFC模型轉換為互補表示：一種用於結構化元素屬性和幾何的關係表示，以及一種用於拓撲關係的圖形表示。這些表示通過迭代重試和精煉的LLM推理進行整合。我們使用開放權重的LLM（GPT OSS 120B）實現該框架，以支持可重現和以部署為導向的工作流程。在三個IFC模型上進行的評估，基於30個場景衍生的查詢顯示首次嘗試的準確率為93.3%-100%，所有失敗均通過回退LLM恢復。結果顯示，將互補表示與迭代推理相結合，使得IFC數據的自然語言查詢更加可及，同時支持常規的BIM分析任務。
2605.13236.author: Rabindra Lamsal et.al.
2605.13236.authors: Rabindra Lamsal, Sisi Zlatanova, Haowen Xu, Yafei Sun, Johnson Xuesong Shen
